-PORTVERSION=	1.630

-COMMENT=	The perl5 Database Interface.  Required for DBD::* modules
+COMMENT=	Perl5 Database Interface, required for DBD::* modules
 
 LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
 LICENSE_COMB=	dual
